domain: EEG voltage time-series (Cz channel, resting state)
data_source: PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (Schalk et al. 2004, doi:10.1186/1743-0003-1-14; Goldberger et al. 2000, PhysioNet). Subjects 1–10, runs 1 (eyes-open) and 2 (eyes-closed) resting-state baseline. 64-channel 160 Hz EEG. Accessed via MNE-Python mne.datasets.eegbci.
encoding_notes: Single channel: Cz (central midline). Bandpass filtered 0.5–40.0 Hz (removes DC drift and muscle artefact above alpha/beta range). Resampled from 160 Hz to 100 Hz to match signal bandwidth (EEG meaningful content 0.5–40 Hz). Amplitude clipped to [p1, p99] to exclude artefact spikes, then discretised into 20 equal-width bins. Each sample encoded as ASCII character 'A'–'T'. 20 recordings concatenated: 10 subjects × 2 runs = 20 files.
